title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS304-4XG-IN
description: The Cloud Router Switch CRS304-4XG-IN is a compact yet highly powerful switch powered by the RouterOS operating system, offering advanced features such as port forwarding, VLAN, MAC address filtering, broadcast storm control, QoS, bandwidth limitation, and many other network management options This switch is equipped with four 10 Gb Ethernet ports. Additionally, it includes an extra 1 Gb Ethernet port for management purposes It comes with a side-mounted DIN rail bracket and standard mounting holes on the back for easy installation. The DIN rail bracket can also be moved to the back of the switch if needed The device features a housing that doubles as a sturdy, lightweight heatsink, eliminating the need for active cooling. This fanless design ensures quiet operation Power redundancy is a key feature of the CRS304. It offers four different power options: 2x jack (12 - 57V DC) , a 2-pin connector , and PoE-in . The device automatically selects the power source with the highest voltage, ensuring uninterrupted operation. CRS304 is powered by a dual-core ARM processor, providing sufficient performance Device Power adapter (48V / 0.95A) Mounting kit
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (4) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10Gbps + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 36 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-In (only) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 21 Power via connector/terminal 12 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop, DIN rail Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 128 Height [mm] 176 Depth [mm] 35 Hardware CPU 98DX2528 CPU frequency [MHz] 1200 CPU cores 2 Internal storage [MB] 32 RAM [MB] 512
